title: Krykis IV

{{Quote|There are several famous cases of this sort of thing—my favorite being the excavation of the 'Voorlach Temple' on Krykis IV, the artifacts of which toured three sectors. The 'temple' turned out to be an indoor marketplace, and the 'religious relics' were revealed as common market goods.|Lecture by Doctor Corellia Antilles|<ref name="Files" />}}
'''Krykis IV''' was a terrestrial celestial body<ref name="Files" /> located in the [[Krykis system/Legends|Krykis system]] of the [[Duluur sector/Legends|Duluur sector]],<ref name="EAOC Krykis" /> a part of the [[Southern Core]] portion of<ref name="TEA Krykis" /> the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]].<ref name="EAOC Krykis" /> At some point, an indoor marketplace became buried on Krykis IV, later being excavated by [[Archaeologist/Legends|archaeologists]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. They presented the find as the "[[Voorlach Temple]]"<ref name="Files" />—which shared its name with the celestial body [[Voorlach]]<ref name="Platt">''[[Platt's Smugglers Guide]]''</ref> of the Duluur [[Sector/Legends|sector's]] [[Voorlach system/Legends|Voorlach system]]<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref>—and took the common market goods retrieved from the structure, which were instead claimed to be religious artifacts, on a tour through three sectors.<ref name="Files" />

The true nature of the "Voorlach Temple" was later revealed, and in a lecture given at the [[Galactic Museum/Legends|Galactic Museum]] on<ref name="Files" /> the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]<ref name="Files" /> around [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]],<ref name="11 ABY">{{JournalCite|14|From the Files of Corellia Antilles}} is set shortly after the re-establishment of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] following the [[Battle of Onderon (Galactic Civil War)|final defeat]] of the resurrected [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]].</ref> the [[Xenoarchaeology/Legends|xenoarchaeologist]] [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Henrietya Antilles|Corellia Antilles]] noted the Krykis IV incident as her "favorite" among such affairs.<ref name="Files" />

==Behind the scenes==
Krykis IV was mentioned in [[Timothy S. O'Brien|Timothy O'Brien's]] article "[[From the Files of Corellia Antilles]]," which was published as part of the [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 14|fourteenth issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'' in [[August]] [[1997]].<ref name="Files" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Krykis [[Star system/Legends|system]], and thereby Krykis IV, in grid square M-13.<ref name="TEA Krykis" />
